name: Service cycle delay is visible in live flow
description: The service cycle is stretching beyond the venue's intended rhythm, creating visible lag between order, production, handoff, and guest delivery.
source_ref: universal-signal-gold-set-01: service or job cycle delay expressed through restaurant service flow
evidence_types: guests wait materially longer than the house rhythm suggests
orders or requests sit too long between steps
the live cycle stalls even when demand is not extreme
